rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Michael and Robert Gridley's Motion for Attorney's Fees is GRANTED in part. The Court grants a total of $34,151.75 in attorney's fees. These fees include all of the categories specified in the Declaration of Jeffrey Bauman with the exception of the attorney's fees incurred as a result of the contempt proceedings brought against Patricia alone ($3,133.88) and the fees incurred in opposing the Motion for Offset ($3,207). The Court finds that those costs were not necessary to enforcement of the underlying judgment. (C.C.P. Section 685.040.) The Court also declines to award the $4,000 in additional anticipated fees as these fees are not supported by the proper documentation. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 6/30/2015, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: James Bennett's Motion to Strike or Tax Costs is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted in part as to the claimed attorney's fees of $40,492.63. These fees are stricken because they are duplicative of the fees claimed in the Judgment Creditors' Motion for Attorney's Fees. The motion is denied as to the $944.26 claimed as other costs and the $62,759.25 claimed as previously allowed post judgment costs. Filing fees are expressly permitted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 1033.5. Courier fees may be permitted in the Court's discretion if they are necessary. (Code of Civ. Procedure Section 1033.5.) Both sides shall submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative shall notify the court no later than 6/30/2015, at 4:00 p.m.
